demo.try_subtitle: Try the app with a 4-bench synthetic pit. No upload, no backend wait. Loads instantly from the CDN.

step1.title: Load Surfaces
step1.max_size: Maximum 500 MB per file. .stl and .xlsx files are excluded from the repository.
step1.plan_view_subtitle_2d: Deferred download: ~3 MB of JS. Only loads when you click.
step1.plan_view_no_data: Load surfaces to see the plan view
step1.view3d_subtitle: Deferred download: ~4 MB of JS + ~22 MB of assets (Workers, Widgets). Only loads when you click.
step1.view3d_no_data: Load surfaces to see the 3D view

step2.title: Define Sections
step2.next_disabled: Define at least one section to continue

tooltip.face_threshold: Minimum angle (degrees) for a segment to be classified as a bench face. Default 40°. Lower values detect gentler faces.
tooltip.berm_threshold: Maximum angle (degrees) for a segment to be classified as a berm. Default 20°. Higher values allow steeper berms.
tooltip.simplify_epsilon: RDP simplification tolerance. Higher = smoother profile. Default 0.1 m.
tooltip.max_berm_width: Anti-noise filter: ignore berms wider than this (m). Default 50 m.
tooltip.tol_bench_height: Allowed deviation in bench height (m). COMPLIES if |deviation| ≤ tolerance.
tooltip.tol_face_angle: Allowed deviation in face angle (°). COMPLIES if |deviation| ≤ tolerance.
tooltip.tol_berm_width: Minimum berm width (m). COMPLIES if actual ≥ minimum.
tooltip.tol_overall: Allowed deviation in overall slope angle (°).

shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.intro: These keys work anywhere in the app (except inside text inputs).
